summary: Quick Send flow testing completed successfully. All backend APIs work correctly (8/8 tests passed). UI verified via Playwright: First name/Last name split, clean styling (no blue focus boxes), duplicate detection, Preview step with Preview link button, SMS note, all send method options, and back navigation.

issues: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node inside <View>' - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

quick_send_info_step_first_last_name_spl.details: First name and Last name are separate fields (not single 'Customer name') - matches clean Add Contact form style

quick_send_input_styling.details: No blue focus outlines, no yellow backgrounds, no colored borders - clean card-based styling with dark backgrounds

phone_duplicate_detection.details: Shows 'Existing contact - Matched' banner when phone matches existing contact, auto-fills name and email

preview_button_disabled_state.details: Preview button is gray/disabled when First name and Phone are empty, becomes gold/enabled when filled

preview_step_navigation.details: Clicking Preview navigates to preview step showing recipient info, message preview, and send options

preview_link_button.details: Preview button (eye icon + 'Preview' text) visible next to Digital Business Card header to open URL

send_method_options.details: Three send options: Text / SMS (default), Email (disabled if no email), Copy Link

sms_note_displayed.details: Note 'This will open your phone's messaging app' shown below send button when SMS selected

back_arrow_preview_to_info.details: Back arrow in header navigates from preview step back to info step

back_arrow_info_to_previous.details: Back arrow from info step goes to previous page (or card type picker for congrats route)

review_link_route.details: Shows 'Send Review Link' header with same clean form (First name, Last name, Phone, Email)

showcase_route.details: Shows 'Share Showcase' header with same clean form

congrats_card_type_picker.details: Shows card type picker first with 6 options: Congrats, Birthday, Holiday, Thank You, Anniversary, Welcome

backend_messages_send_sms_personal.details: Accepts contact_id, content, channel='sms_personal', event_type - creates conversation if needed and logs event

backend_messages_send_email.details: Accepts channel='email' and sends via Resend API

backend_duplicate_check.details: Returns matches array with id, first_name, last_name, phone, email

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes present on interactive elements: qs-first-name, qs-last-name, qs-phone, qs-email, qs-next-btn, qs-preview-link, qs-method-sms/email/copy, qs-send-btn, qs-back, qs-match-banner
Global CSS in _layout.tsx correctly suppresses browser focus outlines via style injection
SMS send uses native sms: protocol which is carrier-agnostic (opens native messaging app)
Console warning 'Unexpected text node inside <View>' appears but is cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: Test contacts created and deleted during test execution (TEST_QuickSend_*, TEST_QS_Conv_*, TEST_QS_Email_*, TEST_QS_Create_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Send flow completely verified: (1) All 4 routes work (/quick-send/digitalcard, /quick-send/review, /quick-send/showcase, /quick-send/congrats), (2) Form has First/Last name split, (3) Duplicate detection auto-fills contact info, (4) Preview step shows Preview link button, message text, and send options, (5) SMS note appears when Text/SMS selected, (6) Backend APIs all working for sms_personal and email channels

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends use native phone app via sms: protocol (carrier-agnostic)

screenshots.quick_send_info_step: Shows First name, Last name, Phone, Email fields with clean styling
screenshots.quick_send_duplicate_match: Shows 'Forest Ward - Existing contact - Matched' banner when phone matches
screenshots.quick_send_preview_step: Shows recipient, Digital Business Card with Preview button, message preview, Text/SMS/Email/Copy Link options, Send via SMS button, and SMS note
screenshots.qs_congrats_card_picker: Shows 6 card type options with icons
screenshots.qs_review_link: Shows 'Send Review Link' header with form
